task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of ~/Desktop/fuselage_spec.txt.
The OpenVSP graphical user interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Create a Fuselage component in OpenVSP
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'FuseGeom' (Fuselage) component is listed in the OpenVSP Geometry Browser or visible in the 3D workspace.

task_completion.description: Modify the fuselage dimensions to match the specification
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Fuselage geometry editing window is open, showing the Design parameters being adjusted (Length between 6.0-11.0, Width between 0.6-1.3, Height between 0.7-1.4).

task_completion.description: Create a Wing component in OpenVSP matching the specified span
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'WingGeom' (Wing) component is listed in the Geometry Browser, and its parameter window shows the span being set (between 11.0-19.0).

task_completion.description: Save the completed model to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the path ~/Documents/OpenVSP/male_uav.vsp3, or the OpenVSP main window title bar displaying 'male_uav.vsp3'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP GUI to build the model
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the OpenVSP menus, Geometry Browser, and parameter windows, rather than writing a .vsp3 XML file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent actually opened and read the spec file
integrity.visual_evidence: The ~/Desktop/fuselage_spec.txt file must be visibly opened in a terminal (e.g., using cat) or a text editor before or during the OpenVSP modeling process.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using the application's native save function
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the 'File -> Save' or 'File -> Save As' menu in OpenVSP rather than using terminal commands to move or rename a pre-existing file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file must be saved exactly to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/male_uav.vsp3. The correct dimensions based on the synthetic spec file are: Fuselage length between 6.0 and 11.0, Fuselage max width between 0.60 and 1.30, Fuselage max height between 0.70 and 1.40, and Wing span between 11.0 and 19.0.
